zh.Llanymynech, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾利安米內
zh.Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wale: 威爾士凱爾納方史爾白 康維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwen verch Iorwerth於大約1260年出生在英國史洛普爾利安米內時，她的父親Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri31歲，母親Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd37歲。她於1280年與Gruffudd Kynaston在威爾士結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1340年在威爾士凱爾納方史爾白 康維享年82歲。

zh-hans.Llanymynech, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾利安米內
zh-hans.Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wale: 威尔士凱爾納方史爾白 康維
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwen verch Iorwerth于大约1260年出生在英国史洛普爾利安米內时，她的父亲Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri31岁，母亲Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd37岁。她于1280年与Gruffudd Kynaston在威尔士结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1340年在威尔士凱爾納方史爾白 康維享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gwen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Gwendolen or Gwenllian , or an independent name from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’. It was borne by a 5th-century saint, aunt of St David and mother of the minor saints Cybi and Cadfan.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwen verch Iorwerth was born about 1260, in Llanymynech, Shropshire, England, her father, Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri, was 31 and her mother, Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd, was 37. She married Gruffudd Kynaston in 1280, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1340, in Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwen verch Iorwerth est née environ 1260, à Llanymynech, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Gruffudd Kynaston en 1280, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1340, à Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwen verch Iorwerth um 1260 in Llanymynech, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri 31 und ihre Mutter Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd 37. Sie hat 1280 in Wales Gruffudd Kynaston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1340 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwen verch Iorwerth è nata il circa 1260 nel Llanymynech, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Gruffudd Kynaston nel 1280, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1340, nel Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Galles, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.Shropshire, England: イギリスシュロプシュアイア
ja.Llanymynech, Shropshire, England: イギリスシュロプシュアイアラニームイネチ
ja.Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wale: ウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアペンルhイン ビー コンワイ
ja.Kinnerley, Shropshire, England: イギリスシュロプシュアイアキネルリー
ja.lifeSummary: Gwen verch Iorwerthが約1260年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアラニームイネチで生まれた時，父Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffriは31歳，母Tangwystl ferch Gruffyddは37歳であった。1280年にウェールズでGruffudd Kynastonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1340年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアペンルhイン ビー コンワイで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwen verch Iorwerth(이)가 대략 1260년 영국 슈럽실르 랜이미니치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1280년 웨일스에서 Gruffudd Kynaston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1340년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 펜히 비 콘웨이에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1260–about 1340: tany ho any amin'ny 1260–tany ho any amin'ny 1340

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwen verch Iorwerth nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Llanymynech, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Gruffudd Kynaston em 1280, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1340, em Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Gales, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwen verch Iorwerth родилась около 1260 г. в местности лланиминеч, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gruffudd Kynaston в 1280 г. в местности Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1340 г. в местности пенрин би конвеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 82 лет.

sm.about 1260–about 1340: e tusa o le 1260–e tusa o le 1340

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwen verch Iorwerth nació aproximadamente 1260, en Llanymynech, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Gruffudd Kynaston en 1280, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1340, en Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 82 años.
